title: Halal Jordan Trust Profile
description: Configurable weighting profile for the Weight and Trust Engine. Defines how structured signals (authenticity, isnad strength, scholar authority, corroboration, ijma, era, source distance, methodology) contribute to a transparent, additive trust score. Unknown signals never inflate scores.

profile_id.description: Stable identifier used to select the profile at runtime.

description.description: Human-readable description: what this profile prioritizes and WHY. Required by the charter's transparency rule.

mode.description: Coarse posture. Strict profiles tend to penalize unknown signals and apply hard thresholds; exploratory profiles are looser.

authenticity_weights.description: Per-grade weights applied when a hadith authenticity grade is known. Keys are normalized grades.

isnad_strength_multiplier.description: Multiplied by the observed isnad_strength (0..1) to produce the contribution.

corroboration_per_count.description: Weight added per corroborating independent source, up to corroboration_cap.

corroboration_cap.description: Maximum corroboration count counted toward the score.

source_distance_penalty.description: Per-step penalty as a source moves further from a primary text (0 = primary, 1 = manual/commentary, 2 = fatwa/transcript).

scholar_authority_multiplier.description: Multiplied by an observed scholar_authority score (0..1).

madhhab_preferences.description: Per-madhhab weights. Applied only when a source's madhhab is known.

methodology_preferences.description: Per-tag weights for methodology tags carried in candidate metadata (e.g., rigorous_isnad, literalist, spiritual_emphasis).

unknown_penalty.description: Small per-missing-signal penalty. Encourages richer ingestion metadata without ever inflating scores when signals are unknown.

strictness_threshold.description: If set, candidates scoring below this threshold are flagged as below_strictness_threshold so the reranker can filter or hard-downweight them.

is_scholar_methodology.description: True if this profile models a specific scholar's methodology. When true, methodology_disclaimer is required (the charter forbids loading a scholar methodology profile without an explicit disclosure that this is modeling, not the scholar speaking).

scholar_name.description: Human-readable scholar name to surface in the UI when this methodology profile is active. Empty for non-scholar profiles.

methodology_overview.description: Short, human-readable summary of the methodology this profile models — what it tends to weight and why. Shown to the user on the profile selector.

methodology_disclaimer.description: REQUIRED for scholar methodology profiles. Must transparently state that this profile is methodology modeling — not the actual scholar speaking, not revelation, not divine certainty. Surfaced in the UI and in rendered answers whenever this profile is active.
